DEFT'S PC995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION FILED

/CAL: SENTENCING/AJW/CH2:SP   2Y  : M/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 367  DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 366   SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 733  DAYS/PPRFCOMP/RESTPAR/X: COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION/DNACOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE: 01-04-19 /PAR70/

/CAL: PTC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 06-15-18/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/VD: 06-08-18/VD: 06-19-18/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/

/HTA1:1, 2, AND 3/X:COUNTS 4 & 5 ARE CERTIFIED,/X:THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATIONS AS TO COUNT 1 TO BE TRUE,/X:THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT WITH REGARD TO THE  ALLEGATIONS THAT ARE ALLEGED PERTAINING TO THE DEFENDANT'S PRIORS,  PROOF HAS BEEN PRESENTED SUFFICIENT TO PROBABLE CAUSE STANDARD ON ALL  OF THE ALLEGATIONS, INCLUDING ALLEGATION OF INELIGIBILITY FOR  PROBATIONPURSUANT TO PENAL CODE   SECTION 667(D), 667(E), 1170,12(B)  AND 1170,12(C), AND FINALLY AN   ALLEGATION OF A PRIOR FELONY OF  STATE PRISON PURSUANTTO PENAL CODE   SECTION 667,5(B),/ /BAIL:100,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPARTMENT 22 ON 03-16-18/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: ROBERT GLENN, SFPD   /WIT SWORN: TREVOR ROBERTS, SFPD/WIT SWORN: KEVIN ADAMS, SFPD/EXHMA: P-1 THROUGH 10, PHOTO IDS AND DMV PRINTOUTS SHOWING DEFENDANT WITH A VARIETY OF DIFFERENT FALSENAMES, P-11 THOUGH 15, COPIES OF RECEIPTS FROMCRATE AND BARREL STORE SHOWING NAME OF CUSTOMER OTHER THAN DEFENDANT'S NAME, DEFENSE A, CERTIFIED COPYOF CAD FOR THIS INCIDENT, DEFENSE B, FOOTAGE FROM THE BODY WORN CAMERA OF OFFICER GLENN, P-16 THROUGH P-19, COLOR PHOTOS OF PURCHASES BEING MADE BY DEFENDANT AT CRATE AND BARREL STORE, P-20, CERTIFIED COPY OF DEFENDANT'S CII/CONTD: ARGUMENT AND HOLDING ORDER FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:THE PEOPLE SUFFER A FIRST DISMISSAL, BUT COUNSEL STIPULATE TO IMMEDIATE REFILE AND REARRAIGNMENT ONTHE SAME COMPLAINT AND CHARGES/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:03-02-18/BAIL:100,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:01-22-18/987,2/BAIL:100,000/CTORD:BAIL BE SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:ESTIME TIME, 5HOURS/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/CONTD:PRETRIAL AND TO SET JURY TRIAL/DOP/
